title: 8 Pack White Crochet Doilies, 6.1in Handmade Round Lace Doilies, Vintage Cotton Placemats Rustic Table Mats for Tables Kitchen Dining Room Party Wedding Birthday Dressers Decoration
features: 【Packing List】The handmade doily set includes 8 white crochet placemats, each measuring 15 × 15 cm (6 x 6 inches). There are four different styles, with two of each style. You can freely choose the patterns you prefer. These crocheted doilies are enough to meet your daily use and replacement needs, adding a rustic touch to your home decor.

【Vintage Style】Round crochet table mats are simple and stylish, featuring floral patterns, classic white, and vintage lace designs. They add a gentle and beautiful rustic, nostalgic charm to your table. These doilies are elegant and can be easily integrated into any part of your home.

【High-Quality Material】The vintage lace doilies are made of high-quality polyester, making them durable, washable, and reusable. With excellent workmanship, they are heat-resistant and not easy to deform or break, ensuring long-term use. The knitted tablecloth can be machine washed and dried directly, making it easy to maintain.

【Get Creative in DIY】Our lace round embroidered table doily cloth is easy to sew and perfect for DIY projects. You can sew the lace doilies onto clothes and pillows or combine several together to create a unique piece. This allows you to make each doily special in your own way.

【Wedding Decoration for Home】These handmade cotton doilies are suitable for both home decoration and artistic purposes. Place them on dressers, nightstands, tables, sofas, lamps, and other furniture in your home. They can also be used on wedding trays, mugs, vases, table decorations, cookie plates, cake plates, and any occasion that warrants celebration.
